name: @radzor/ip-geolocation
description: Look up geographic data from IP addresses using the free ip-api.com service. Get country, city, coordinates, timezone, ISP, and organization info for single or bulk IP lookups.

inputs.name: cacheTtl
inputs.description: Cache TTL in milliseconds for lookup results (default: 1 hour).

inputs.name: lang
inputs.description: Language code for localized city/region names (e.g. 'en', 'de', 'fr', 'ja').

outputs.name: geoResult
outputs.description: Geographic information for an IP address.

events.name: onLookup
events.description: Fired after a successful IP lookup.

actions.name: lookup

params.name: ip
params.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to look up.

actions.description: Look up geographic data for a single IP address.

actions.name: bulkLookup

params.name: ips
params.description: Array of IP addresses to look up (max 100 per batch).

actions.description: Look up geographic data for multiple IP addresses in a single batch request.

llm.constraints: Uses the free ip-api.com service which is limited to 45 requests/minute for non-commercial use (HTTP only). For production, consider a paid plan or self-hosted MaxMind database. Bulk lookups are limited to 100 IPs per batch. Results are cached in-memory.
